name: xuanche-engine
description: Cloudflare Worker bridge for the Xuanche cultivation world in Notion and GitHub.

scripts.deploy:gateway: npm --prefix gateway test && npm run test:actions && npm run verify:worker-backend -- https://plain-dew-5810xuanche-api.amber0983310929.workers.dev 0.5.16 && npm --prefix gateway run deploy && npm run verify:actions -- https://xuanche-engine-gateway.pages.dev 0.5.13 0.5.16
scripts.deploy:release: npm run check && npx --no-install wrangler deploy && npm --prefix gateway run deploy && npm run verify:actions -- https://xuanche-engine-gateway.pages.dev
scripts.check: node --check worker.js && node --test && npm run test:actions
